description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on pull requests to the master branch, on push to the master branch, on workflow dispatch, and on a scheduled cron job. The workflow should run tests on multiple platforms (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest) and Python versions (3.9, 3.10, 3.11, 3.12, pypy-3.9, pypy-3.10) in a matrix strategy. For each job, check out the repository, set up the specified Python version, install build tools with pip, run tests with tox, and optionally install Scipy prerequisites and run tests with Scipy.
